changelog.label: Coordinator chat: natural language + useful fallback
changes: Remove ^ anchors from all coordinator chat pattern matchers — phrases like 'show me results', 'list signals', 'what did you find' now work
Add 'results gen', 'show result', 'list result' patterns → routes to signals chat
help command now shows a full command list instead of an Ollama nag
Final fallback (unknown input) now shows status + a helpful hint instead of the Ollama URL message

changelog.label: App load speed optimisation
changes: Signal board: replace N parallel per-symbol Binance calls with single bulk ticker request cached 30s server-side — was 50 HTTP calls per page load, now 1
Add defer to i18n.js script tag — was parser-blocking, now non-blocking
Add DB indexes idx_trades_user_closed (user_id, closed_at DESC) and idx_trades_api_key_status — speeds up weekly earnings and trade history queries
gzip compression was already enabled — confirmed active

changelog.label: Re-sync closed Bitunix trades + fix AI 400 error
changes: Add POST /api/dashboard/resync-bitunix — re-fetches all closed Bitunix trades from exchange and corrects exit_price, pnl_usdt, gross_pnl, trading_fee, status in DB
Processes up to 200 most recent closed trades, matches by positionId first then entry price, 200ms delay between requests to avoid rate limits
Returns JSON with fixed/skipped/failed counts and before/after values for every trade
Fix AI 400 invalid_request_error — Anthropic rejects empty string content; add fallback to safe defaults before calling API

changelog.label: Bitunix sync: store positionId, match by ID, raw data debug endpoint
changes: Add bitunix_position_id column to trades table — stored when position opens
Sync now matches by positionId first (exact, no ambiguity), falls back to entry price + time
Try all known Bitunix field name variations: closePrice/avgClosePrice/closedPrice, realizedPNL/realizedPnl/pnl/profit, fee/tradingFee/commission, etc.
Log full raw position[0] JSON at every sync — field names visible in Railway logs
Add GET /api/dashboard/debug/bitunix-positions?symbol=SOLUSDT endpoint (admin only) — returns raw Bitunix history to confirm field names without waiting for a trade close

changelog.label: Bitunix sync: use exchange data directly, no math
changes: Removed all price-based math for Bitunix P&L — use exchange values as-is
pnlUsdt = realizedPNL exactly as Bitunix returns it (NET, fees already deducted)
tradingFee = p.fee exactly as Bitunix returns it
fundingFee = p.funding exactly as Bitunix returns it
grossPnl = realizedPNL + fee + funding (simple add-back only, no price × qty)
Binance path unchanged: realizedPnl is GROSS, net = gross - fees
Fallback (no exchange data at all): price × qty estimate with 0.12% fee estimate

changelog.label: Fix Bitunix sync matching wrong position — entry price required
changes: Root cause: position history match used (entryMatch OR timeMatch) — timeMatch alone matched ANY SOLUSDT LONG that closed after our trade opened
Example: SOL LONG SL hit at 83.30 (-$1.18), but sync matched a different SOL LONG that closed at 86.10 — showed as gross +$1.15 when actual was -$1.18
Fix: require entryMatch (entry price within 0.5%) AND closedAfterOpen — timeMatch alone no longer qualifies
Among multiple entry-price candidates, pick the one whose close time is closest to our trade open time
Entry tolerance tightened 1% → 0.5% — at $85 SOL, 0.5% = $0.43 (covers real slippage, rejects unrelated positions)
Result: sync now reads the correct Bitunix position, correct close price, and correct net P&L

changelog.label: Fix Bitunix fee display — show true total cost not partial entry fee
changes: Root cause of gross+$1.15/fee-$0.08/net-$0.20 inconsistency: Bitunix position history p.fee is entry-leg fee only, not round-trip
True total cost (both legs + funding + any slippage) = gross - net = $1.15 - (-$0.20) = $1.35
Fix: back-calculate implied total cost as grossPnl - pnlUsdt and store as trading_fee when Bitunix realizedPnl is available
Fee column now shows the actual total deduction — gross - fee = net will always be consistent
Sanity check: only use implied cost if it is positive and less than 5× the gross (guards against bad exchange data)
Removed stale totalFee variable that was computed before the Bitunix fee override — moved into Binance branch only where it is needed

changelog.label: Fix Bitunix P&L calculation — null handling + gross computation
changes: Bug 1: realizedPnl = parseFloat(p.realizedPNL || 0) — if Bitunix field is absent/null, this set realizedPnl=0, which is not null, so the Bitunix branch ran with zeroed P&L overriding everything
Fix: p.realizedPNL != null ? parseFloat(p.realizedPNL) : null — properly keeps null when field is missing
Same fix applied to Method 2 (order history): profit/pnl/realizedPNL all use != null check
Bug 2: grossPnl reconstructed as realizedPnl + totalFee — Bitunix net P&L can include slippage and accumulated funding not captured in our fee field, making reconstruction inaccurate
Fix: grossPnl computed from (exitPrice - entryPrice) × qty — matches what the trade history UI shows as the price-based movement
Net P&L (pnlUsdt) continues to use exchange's authoritative realizedPNL value when available
Result: gross P&L and net P&L are now consistent and accurate — LOSS when fee > profit is correct behavior

changelog.label: Fix duplicate agent execution — orphaned setInterval timers
changes: Root cause: _startCeoLoop() and _startTokenScanLoop() created new setInterval instances without clearing the previous one
Each re-init (error recovery, reconnect) stacked another timer — after 4 re-inits, ETHAgent/SOLAgent/BNBAgent each ran 4× per tick
Fix: clearInterval(this._ceoTimer) added at the start of _startCeoLoop() before creating new interval
Fix: clearInterval(this._tokenScanTimer) added at the start of _startTokenScanLoop() before creating new interval
Each timer reference is now cleared before being overwritten — no orphaned intervals can accumulate
Result: each token agent runs exactly once per scan tick regardless of how many times coordinator re-initializes

changelog.label: BOS_SHORT/LONG: Zeiierman 1m LH/HL structure for precise entry
changes: BOS_SHORT rewritten: replaces crude 'count bearish candles' with Zeiierman detectCurvedStructure() on 1m (rmaLen=8, pivotLen=3)
LH LH (Lower Highs) on 1m = structural shift down confirmed by smart money — far more accurate than candle counting
Scoring uses Zeiierman shortProbability: >60 = +2, >80 = +1, 2+ consecutive LH = +1
BOS_LONG added (Strategy 8): mirror strategy using HL HL (Higher Lows) on 1m for breakout entries
BOS_LONG fires when price breaks above 15m resistance with Zeiierman HL structure + volume — enters at the START of the breakout
Both strategies exempt from: EMA200 hard block (→ -3 penalty), h1Trend counter-trend penalty, BTC correlation penalty, range-position penalty
BOS_LONG also exempt from 'buying at top of range' penalty (by definition it fires at resistance)
Entry: top of the move (beginning) not bottom/end — 1m confirmation fires within 1 minute of break

changelog.label: BOS_SHORT: entry at breakdown start using 1m candles
changes: Previous BOS_SHORT waited for a full 15m candle to close below support — entry was near the end of the drop, not the beginning
New flow: support level from 15m closed candles (last 20 excl. forming), entry fires on 1m candles the moment the break starts
Trigger conditions: price within 0.3% of support AND 3+ of last 6 1m candles bearish AND 1+ of last 4 1m candles closed below support AND strong 1m body (>0.1%) AND 1m volume above average
Entry price = live price at the top of the breakdown, not the bottom
SL: just above broken support level (support becomes resistance); TP: 2× ATR below entry
Bonus scoring: 4+ bearish 1m candles +1, 5+ bearish +1, RSI<50 +1, h1Trend bearish +2, 15m EMA bearish +1

changelog.label: Stop shorting at the bottom after a drop
changes: Root cause: 1h EMA lags — trend turns 'bearish' AFTER the drop. Bot was shorting at the bottom when trend finally flipped, then price bounced = loss
SHORT RSI hard block raised from <30 to <42: RSI 30-42 after a drop = already oversold, don't pile in short
SHORT price-in-range bottom 20% now a HARD BLOCK (was -3 penalty): if price is at the floor of recent 20-candle range, other strategies cannot open a short
SHORT price-in-range 20-35% now -4 heavy penalty (near bottom = bad short entry)
BOS_SHORT exempted from both rules: it fires DURING the breakdown (price is near low by definition) and is designed for that
Net result: bot only shorts at the top of a range or mid-range moves, never chases drops that already happened

changelog.label: Add BOS_SHORT — catch big sudden drops
changes: New strategy: Break of Structure SHORT (BOS_SHORT) — fires when price crashes through recent 15-candle support
Requires: close below support by 0.15%+, strong bearish candle body (>0.3%), 15m EMA9 < EMA21, volume above average, RSI < 65
Base score 9 — high confidence breakdown; bonuses for very large candle (+2), consecutive bear candles (+1), RSI < 50 (+1), 1h trend bearish (+2)
EMA200 hard block softened to -3 penalty for BOS_SHORT only (breakdowns start in bull trends by definition)
h1Trend bullish penalty (-4) exempted for BOS_SHORT (counter-trend reversal strategy)
BTC correlation penalty (-5) exempted for BOS_SHORT (BTC dropping with alts = confirmation, not contradiction)
All other strategies retain their EMA200 hard block and h1Trend penalty
SL: just above broken support level (support becomes resistance); TP: 2x ATR below entry

changelog.label: Trailing SL first lock must clear fees + profit
changes: First trailing SL lock now dynamically adjusted to cover entry fee + exit fee + funding + 5% capital profit minimum
Fee cost in capital % = (0.08% taker both legs + 0.03% funding) × leverage
At 20x: fees = 2.2% capital → first lock stays at 10% capital (already covers fees)
At 50x: fees = 5.5% capital → first lock raised to 10.5% capital
At 100x: fees = 11% capital → first lock raised to 16% capital (was 10%, was losing money after fees)
Subsequent trailing steps are unaffected — only the first step (lastStep=0) gets the minimum floor
Ensures every trailing SL exit is profitable, not just break-even or a loss

changelog.label: Fix duplicate trades — signal dedup + early dedup mark
changes: Signal dedup: filter signals array by symbol before the main loop — only the highest-scored signal per symbol per cycle passes to executeForAllUsers
Multiple strategies (LiqSweep + SLHunt) can fire on same token; without this both called executeForAllUsers → 2 trades per user
Move executedUserSymbols.add(dedupKey) to immediately after order placement (Binance + Bitunix), before DB INSERT
Previously if DB INSERT failed after exchange order succeeded, dedupKey was never added → second key or next signal could open a second trade
Both fixes together prevent same-symbol duplicates within a cycle regardless of how many strategies fire on the same token

changelog.label: Fix trailing SL — capital % triggers, 15% step increments
changes: TRAILING_TIERS converted from PRICE % to CAPITAL % (profit as % of margin)
First trigger: +30% capital gain → lock SL at +10% capital above entry
Each additional +15% capital gain → add +15% more to the SL lock (not +10%)
calculateTrailingStep now uses capitalPct = pricePct × leverage for tier comparison
SL lock % converted back to price % (capitalLock / leverage) for actual order price
At 20x leverage: trailing SL fires at +1.5% price move (+30% capital) — realistic for crypto
At 100x leverage: fires at +0.3% price move (+30% capital)
Beyond last tier (+120% capital): keeps adding +15% lock per +15% capital gain
checkTrailingStop() now called at end of every cycle (not just when no signals)
lastStep stored in DB is now in capital % (consistent with tier comparison)

changelog.label: Restore v2.0 strategies — 24/7, 4 tokens only
changes: Restored liquidity-sweep-engine.js from v2.0-stable tag (LiqSweep + SLHunt + MomScalp + BRR-Fib strategies)
Removed all 3 timing restrictions from scanSMC(): isAvoidTime() block gone, getActiveSession() gate gone, checkDailyLimits() block gone
Bot now trades 24/7 — scans and enters signals at any hour with no session window requirement
Hard 4-token whitelist inside scanSMC(): BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, SOLUSDT, BNBUSDT only — all other coins filtered before analysis
Coordinator updated: now calls scanSMC() from liquidity-sweep-engine instead of trade-engine.scanAll()
trade-engine.js (TEN_CANDLE_EXTREME) remains in repo but no longer called

changelog.label: Run TEN_CANDLE_EXTREME only — disable all other strategies
changes: Disabled strategies 1-6 (HTF_SWING, VWAP_REJECTION, CONSOL_REJECT, LIQ_SWEEP, MOMENTUM, SWING_REVERSAL)
Only TEN_CANDLE_EXTREME is active — one clean strategy with no conflicting signals
Buy at the floor of the last 10 candles (bottom 15% + 7+ closes above)
Sell at the ceiling of the last 10 candles (top 15% + 7+ closes below)
All directional rules (master law, momentum block, RSI, h1Trend, opBias) still apply as safety filters

changelog.label: Strategy 7: 10-Candle Extreme — buy at the floor, sell at the ceiling
changes: New Strategy 7: TEN_CANDLE_EXTREME — checks last 10 completed 15m candles
LONG trigger: current price in bottom 15% of 10-candle range AND 7+ of 10 candles close ABOVE current price → buying at the very floor
SHORT trigger: current price in top 15% of 10-candle range AND 7+ of 10 candles close BELOW current price → selling at the very ceiling
1m confirmation required: green candle or hammer for LONG, red candle or bear-pin for SHORT
Tighter position = higher bonus: bottom 5% = +3, bottom 10% = +2, bottom 15% = +1 (same for SHORT top)
Engulf pattern on 1m adds +2 bonus (strong reversal confirmation)
SL: 0.5% beyond the 10-candle range extreme
Base score: 9 (same as SWING_REVERSAL — precise level entry)
Counter-trend exception: may enter against h1Trend at RSI extremes (RSI>70 for SHORT, RSI<35 for LONG)
Exempt from the global range-position filter (has its own stricter 15% internal check)
Both SWING_REVERSAL and TEN_CANDLE_EXTREME now in REVERSAL_STRATEGIES set for the counter-trend exception

changelog.label: COMPREHENSIVE FIX: Master directional law — correct direction every trade
changes: ROOT CAUSE AUDIT: 5 independent bugs all allowed wrong-direction trades
BUG 1 — Hard block required BOTH h1Trend AND EMA200 to agree. If h1=bullish but EMA200=bearish, SHORTs still passed. FIX: hard block now triggers on h1Trend ALONE

BUG 2 — SWING_REVERSAL SHORT had zero h1Trend check. Would fire SHORT at any swing high even in uptrend. FIX: SWING_REVERSAL counter-trend only allowed at RSI extremes (SHORT in h1 bull only if RSI>70, LONG in h1 bear only if RSI<35)

BUG 3 — HTF_SWING SHORT had no 1h check. 3m LH+LL fires during ANY pullback, even healthy uptrend retracements. FIX: master directional block at scoring level now blocks HTF_SWING SHORT in h1 uptrend (score=-99)

BUG 4 — Momentum block required ALL 3 candles green/red. One doji cancelled the whole block (e.g. green+doji+green bounce = momentumDir stays neutral). FIX: upgraded to 2-of-3 rule — 2+ candles same direction AND >0.8% move = momentum confirmed
BUG 5 — CONSOL_REJECT SHORT had no 1h check. Only looked at 15m EMAs. FIX: master directional block catches this — h1=bullish blocks all CONSOL_REJECT SHORTs
MASTER DIRECTIONAL LAW: h1Trend=bullish → ONLY LONG | h1Trend=bearish → ONLY SHORT | neutral → both with strong confirmation needed
Counter-trend exception: SWING_REVERSAL at RSI extremes may trade against h1 (catches blow-off tops and capitulation lows) but with -3 penalty
opBias penalty doubled: -1 → -2 for trading against daily VWAP bias
EMA200 alignment now also gives +1 bonus when trade aligns (was penalty-only before)

changelog.label: Entry precision — buy at HL bottom, not mid-range
changes: Root cause of mid-range entries: CONSOL_REJECT, VWAP_REJECTION, MOMENTUM had no check for WHERE in the range price was — they'd fire anywhere
Global Filter 6: Range position ratio — measures where current price sits in the last 20 candles (0=low, 1=high)
LONG mid-range (60%+ into 20-candle range): -4 penalty — buying 60% into a move is wrong zone
LONG at bottom (≤30% of range): +2 bonus — buying near the low is correct
SHORT mid-range (≤40% from bottom): -4 penalty — shorting near the bottom is wrong zone
SHORT at top (≥70% of range): +2 bonus — shorting near the high is correct
Structure strategies (SWING_REVERSAL, HTF_SWING, LIQ_SWEEP) exempt from range filter — they already check level proximity internally
HTF_SWING base score raised 6→8 (structure-based, enters at 1m HL/LH = correct levels)
Score math: LONG mid-range CONSOL_REJECT = 6+3+1+2+2-4 = 10. Still passes if trend is aligned. But counter-trend mid-range = 6+3-3-1-1-4 = 0. Blocked.

changelog.label: Fix ETH SHORT in uptrend + raise MIN_SCORE + per-user trade dedup
changes: Root cause of ETH SHORT in bull trend: MIN_SCORE was 4, CONSOL_REJECT SHORT in uptrend scores exactly 4 (6+3-3-1-1) — scraped through
Raised MIN_SCORE from 4 to 8 in scanAll() — counter-trend signals now rejected, aligned signals still pass at 12-19
Added hard directional block: if h1Trend bullish AND EMA200 bullish → score set to -99 for ANY SHORT signal (no exceptions)
Same block for downtrend: h1Trend bearish AND EMA200 bearish → no LONGs
SKIP log now shown when signal fails MIN_SCORE — visible reason why signal was rejected
Fixed 3x duplicate trades: dedup now checks by user_id not api_key_id — users with 3 API keys no longer get 3 identical trades
Dedup key changed from api_key:id:symbol to user:userId:symbol — all keys of same user share the in-cycle dedup set

changelog.label: Momentum block — stop shorting into bull breakouts
changes: Root cause of SOL short into bull breakout: CONSOL_REJECT saw EMA9<EMA21 (all-day downtrend) + price at coil top → fired SHORT, but price had already broken above both EMAs = it was a reversal, not a rejection
Global Filter 5: momentum block — if last 3 completed 15m candles are ALL green/red AND total move >0.8%, counter-trend signals get -8 score penalty (effectively blocked)
CONSOL_REJECT SHORT now requires price to still be BELOW both EMA9 and EMA21 — if price broke above both EMAs, it's a bullish reversal not a coil top
CONSOL_REJECT LONG now requires price to still be ABOVE both EMAs
CONSOL_REJECT: added EMA separation check (emaSep > 0.1%) — prevents firing when EMAs have converged and trend is unclear
Momentum riding bonus: signals aligned WITH strong momentum get +3 score bonus

changelog.label: CRITICAL FIX: Remove auto-pause that blocked all users silently
changes: Root cause of other users not trading: auto-pause fired every cycle for any user registered >7 days ago with positive PnL
Removed payment-overdue auto-pause from executeForAllUsers() — payment gating belongs in admin panel only
Added one-time unblock: clears any paused_by_admin=true flags set by the old auto-pause logic on first deploy
Diagnostic log now shows 'platform' (not 'exchange') so you can see bitunix/binance correctly

changelog.label: 4-coin restriction + unified trade-engine
changes: trade-engine.js: hard-coded ALLOWED_SYMBOLS = BTC/ETH/SOL/BNB — no other coins can be scanned
ChartAgent now uses trade-engine.scanAll() — old scanSMC/liquidity-sweep-engine no longer called
Fixes SWARMS/XRP/1000PEPE trades: old ChartAgent scanned top 50 coins from Binance ticker

changelog.label: Fix signal blockers: backtest gate, risk score gate, MIN_SCORE
changes: smc-engine signals now carry strategyWinRate:60-70 — bypasses backtest-gate 30-day sim
risk-agent: score gate skipped for signals with strategyWinRate>=60
risk-agent: swarm contradiction skipped for trusted-WR signals
ai-learner: MIN_SCORE default 8→4, clamp floor 6→4
These were the final gates blocking all SMC and HTF signals from reaching execution

changelog.label: CRITICAL FIX: Wire sweep engine into coordinator + loosen smc-engine gates
changes: Root cause of zero trades: coordinator used smc-engine.js, NOT liquidity-sweep-engine.js — scanSMC in cycle.js was NEVER called by the pipeline
FIX: Wire liquidity-sweep-engine.scanSMC() directly into coordinator execute() — all 9 strategies now active
FIX: smc-engine.js EMA200(1h) hard block removed — changed to -3 score penalty only
FIX: smc-engine.js MAX_CHASE_PCT 0.6% → 1.5% — allows entering fast-moving markets
FIX: smc-engine.js swing age limit 6 → 20 candles — was rejecting valid setups that formed >6 min ago
FIX: smc-engine.js SL range widened 0.1-2% → 0.05-5% — was blocking valid structures
FIX: smc-engine.js scanSMC() session gates removed (24/7 trading)
FIX: smc-engine.js AI hour check is now informational only — no longer blocks signals
Score degradation: chase 0.6-1.5% = -2 penalty, old swing (>6 candles) = -1 penalty, EMA200 against = -3 penalty

changelog.label: CRITICAL FIX: Wire SMC engine into trade cycle + gate tuning
changes: BUG: scanSMC() was never imported or called in cycle.js — all 9 SMC strategies were dead code
FIX: Import scanSMC from liquidity-sweep-engine.js in cycle.js
FIX: Call scanSMC() each cycle alongside aiSignals, spikeHL, T-junction
FIX: SMC signals get strategyWinRate=60-70 to bypass backtest gate
Backtest gate: MIN_WIN_RATE stays 50% for real backtested strategies
Backtest gate: bypass threshold raised 55→60 (only trusted WR>=60 signals bypass)
Backtest gate: SMC strategies removed from KNOWN_STRATEGIES — use 60+ WR bypass path instead of unreliable backtest sim
SMC signals logged: 'SMC Engine: N signal(s) — SYMBOL DIR [SETUP] score=X'
Root cause of zero trades since launch: scanSMC was NEVER in the execution pipeline

changelog.label: Fix range detection + add Consolidation Rejection strategy
changes: Fix RANGE_BOUNCE: EMA spread threshold loosened 1.5% → 2.5% (was blocking all post-trend consolidations)
Fix RANGE_BOUNCE: lookback reduced 40 → 25 candles (focuses on current range, not old trend candles)
Fix RANGE_BOUNCE: wall proximity tolerance widened 0.3% → 0.5% (catches more valid entries)
Add Strategy 8: CONSOL_REJECTION — detects price coiling after a strong move then rejecting at extreme
SHORT: EMA9<EMA21 (downtrend) + price at top 65%+ of consolidation + bearish candle → short the coil top
LONG: EMA9>EMA21 (uptrend) + price at bottom 35% of consolidation + bullish candle → long the coil bottom
Consolidation confirmed when recent-10 ATR < 65% of prior-15 ATR (price coiling = energy building)
VWAP_REJECTION renamed Strategy 9 (was 8) to make room
This fix catches the ETH/BNB consolidation-top short that was previously missed

changelog.label: 24/7 trading + VWAP Rejection strategy
changes: Remove ALL time restrictions — bot scans and trades 24/7 based purely on signal score
Removed: SESSION_WINDOWS, AVOID_HOURS_UTC, getActiveSession(), isAvoidTime() logic
Removed: session score bonus (+2 in-session) and penalty (-1 outside session)
Removed: outsideSession parameter from analyzeCoin()
scanSMC log now shows '24/7' instead of session name
Add Strategy 8: VWAP Rejection — detects price poking through VWAP then closing back
VWAP SHORT: 15m candle high > VWAP, close < VWAP, rejection wick ≥ 50% of body
VWAP LONG: 15m candle low < VWAP, close > VWAP, rejection wick ≥ 50% of body
SL: beyond wick tip + 0.5×ATR buffer. TP: 2×ATR dynamic target (RR ~1:2)
VWAP hoisted to function scope so both bias check and rejection strategy share it

changelog.label: Fix SL back to margin-based (30% of trade), keep price-based trailing
changes: SL: always 30% from entry PRICE regardless of leverage (was SL_PCT/leverage = 0.3% at 100x, now capped at liquidation guard 80% of liq distance)
At 20x (BNB/SOL): SL capped at 4% from entry (80% of 5% liq distance) — was 1.5%
At 100x (BTC/ETH): SL capped at 0.8% from entry (80% of 1% liq distance) — was 0.3%
Trailing SL: rewritten to price-based tiers (no leverage conversion)
Trailing rule: first fires at +30% price gain → lock +10% above entry
Every +15% more price gain → add +10% to the locked SL
Gap between current price and trailing SL: always ~20% — much more breathing room
Candle-low trail (15m) unchanged — still provides early locking during normal moves

changelog.label: Fix BNB/SOL defaulting to 100x leverage — root cause of tight SL
changes: Bug: getTokenLeverage() fallback (priority 4) put BNB and SOL in HIGH_PRICE_TOKENS with BTC/ETH → all defaulted to 100x when no DB setting existed
At 100x: BNB SL = 0.30/100 = 0.3% = $1.80 at $600 BNB — clipped by normal candle wicks
Fix: explicit per-symbol defaults — BTC/ETH → 100x, BNB/SOL → 20x, matches admin UI token card labels
At 20x: BNB SL = 0.30/20 = 1.5% = $9 — survives normal volatility
Price-based fallback for other tokens updated: ≥$1000 → 100x, ≥$100 → 50x, else → 20x

changelog.label: Fix SL + trailing SL too near at high leverage
changes: Add MIN_SL_PRICE_PCT = 0.005 (0.5%) — hard floor on SL distance from entry regardless of leverage
At 100x: SL was 0.3% (too tight) → now guaranteed minimum 0.5% ($450 on BTC $90k)
Applied to both owner account entry and all user account entries
Trailing tier gap widened: 4% → 8% margin between trigger and lock-in level
Trailing SL now stays further behind current price, reducing premature stop-outs on retracements
Scanner ATR SL multiplier: 1.2× → 1.5× — signal-level SL gets more breathing room vs candle wicks

changelog.label: Multi-language support — EN / 中文 / BM
changes: Add i18n system: client-side translation dictionary for English, Chinese Simplified, Bahasa Malaysia
Language switcher dropdown in app header (flag + label, persists across sessions via localStorage)
data-i18n attributes on all static UI elements: nav tabs, table headers, period filters, empty states, buttons, labels
Dynamic UI (pause bot status, Kronos bullish/bearish/neutral counts) uses i18n.t() at render time
togglePause state detection rewritten to use data-i18n attribute (not textContent) — language-safe
CSS: .i18n-switcher, .i18n-dropdown styles added to style.css

changelog.label: Revert v1.0.3 — cash wallet stays 0 until top-up or referral commission
changes: Reverted v1.0.3: recordProfitSplit no longer touches cash_wallet
Cash wallet correct model: only grows from manual top-ups + referral commission when referral pays weekly fee
Trade profits (60%/40%) logged in wallet_transactions for PnL display only — not credited to cash wallet
Cash wallet breakdown display: removed profit_share row, kept top-ups + referral commission + fees paid
Updated breakdown note to clearly explain the cash wallet model

changelog.label: Auto-credit profit splits to cash wallet on every trade close
changes: recordProfitSplit: user's 60% share now credited to users.cash_wallet immediately when trade closes
recordProfitSplit: platform's 40% fee now credited to all admin users' cash_wallet automatically
Admins split equally if multiple admin accounts exist
wallet_transactions still recorded for full audit trail
Cash wallet breakdown note updated: 60% shown as real credited amount, not exchange-only reference
Previously: profit split was logged only, no cash_wallet was ever updated from trades

changelog.label: Fix admin user list showing wallet_balance instead of cash_wallet
changes: Bug: admin Users table showed wallet_balance column (always $0) instead of cash_wallet + commission_earned
Fix: renderAdminUsers now computes bal = cash_wallet + commission_earned — matches dashboard display
Fix: Edit Wallet button pre-fills correct balance (was always pre-filling $0)

changelog.label: Fix Kronos 4-token filter + cash wallet breakdown display
changes: Kronos route: filter DB results to only BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT/SOLUSDT/BNBUSDT — old 10-token rows excluded
Kronos header: updated label from '(10 tokens)' to '(N tokens — BTC/ETH/SOL/BNB)'
Cash wallet breakdown: profit_shares were computed server-side but never rendered on screen — now shown
Cash wallet breakdown: replaced flat text with itemised table (top-ups / referral commission / 60% profits / fees paid)
Cash wallet: added note clarifying 60% trade profits stay on exchange, shown for reference only

changelog.label: Filter Fixes + 24/7 Optimizer + Versioning
changes: Fix: all strategies run 24/7 — session gate changed from hard block to +2 score bonus in-session / -1 out-of-session
Fix: EMA200 bias changed from hard block (score=-99) to -3 penalty / +2 bonus
Fix: removed AVOID_MINUTES blackout (00/15/30/45 min) — was killing too many valid entries
Fix: session open 30-min blackout removed
Fix: MIN_SCORE fallback lowered 8→6
Fix: MOMENTUM_SCALP trendStrength 7→5, pinBarWickRatio 2.5→2.0
Fix: RSI hard block raised to RSI>78 long / RSI<22 short
RANGE_BOUNCE: detect walls from swing clusters (findSwingWalls), not absolute max/min
RANGE_BOUNCE: wall-only entries — 0.3% tolerance, mid-range (25-75%) blocked
Per-symbol daily trade limits — all 4 coins trade independently
Remove daily trade count cap — trade on valid signals only
Kronos + AI scanner limited to BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT/SOLUSDT/BNBUSDT only
Chart indicator font set to 15pt
RANGE_BOUNCE added to backtest gate (KNOWN_STRATEGIES)
Token pool seeding: only on first boot, not on every restart
Exhaustive 24/7 optimizer (genetic search) added — background agent
Optimizer results API: GET /api/dashboard/optimizer/results
Version system: version.json + bump-version.js + GET /api/version

changelog.label: Trailing SL Watchdog + Structural Entry Guards + Range Filter
changes: Candle-low trailing SL — SL follows previous 15m candle low (LONG) / high (SHORT)
Trail SL watchdog runs as separate process every 15s — persistent, never misses a move
Trailing SL profit tier guarantee — locks in profit before candle trail kicks in
Fee floor on first SL — minimum 1% gain before SL trails to protect from fee loss
SHORT bias at range top — detects resistance and prefers short signals near highs
Block LONG/SHORT at structural extremes — buy HL/LL only, sell HH/LH only
Add 1m spike hard block — stops entering during fast pump/dump candles
Fix Bitunix trailing SL: positionId lookup was silently returning false
Fix SMC_HL_STRUCTURE: buy at HL retest bottom, not breakout top
Fix trailing SL precision + extend re-entry cooldown to 60min
Fix: scanAI falls back to classic SMC when no learned strategies exist
Add range filter to ai-signal-scanner — the real signal source for Kronos
Switch ChartAgent to liquidity-sweep-engine — disable ai-signal-scanner
Add auto-deploy script — pulls latest code and restarts on new push
Add VSA Multi Volume Histogram to MCT chart
Fix 3 blockers causing zero trades to execute
Disable Triple MA strategy — 24.1% WR in backtest (net -24.7%)

changes: Implement MCT PDF strategy rules for SMC HL/LH trades
SMC HL/LH structure strategy with Zeiierman curved band detection
Chart 1m candle display fix
Add funding_fee as separate tracked field across all trade paths
Bitunix referral link per user, platform guide download
Live exchange positions visible in emergency close panel
Remove ERROR trades from trade history for all accounts
Fix Binance API method name: getAccountTradeList → getAccountTrades
Fix double fee deduction in cycle.js Bitunix trade close sync
Fix Bitunix trade history sync: wrong side check + double fee
Fix backtest gate blocking AI signals that already have their own WR
Relax SMC entry timing: swing age 3→6, chase distance 0.4%→0.6%
Fix zero-trade issue: backtest gate blocked everything at 80% WR

Wire Hermes memory into all agents — persistent cross-agent intelligence
Fix email tab visibility on dark theme
Disable HTML caching so updates deploy instantly
